verification_summary: Disposable NTFS volume D: changed serial from CC4E-A19B to DC51-3D84 via NTFS format mutation, then restored fixture files, hash-verified, repair-scanned, and cleared the disk.
operator_notes: Serial mutation was destructive and used only backup/restore on a disposable volume.
